fix: System Python is externally managed (PEP 668). Create a virtual environment: python3 -m venv .venv && source .venv/bin/activate
Package not installed. Run: pip install {module}

match: pip's dependency resolver does not currently
fix: Dependency conflict detected. Try: pip install --upgrade conflicting-package, or create a fresh virtual environment.

match: Could not find a version that satisfies
fix: Package version not found. Check the package name and version on PyPI. Try: pip install package-name (without version pin).
Permission error. Do NOT use sudo with pip. Create a virtual environment instead: python3 -m venv .venv && source .venv/bin/activate

match: Cannot uninstall .* It is a distutils installed project
fix: This package was installed by the system package manager. Create a fresh virtual environment to avoid conflicts: python3 -m venv .venv --clear

match: ERROR: Could not build wheels for
fix: Build failed. You may need system-level build dependencies. On macOS: xcode-select --install. On Linux: apt install build-essential python3-dev
Network error during package download. Check your internet connection. If behind a proxy, configure pip: pip config set global.proxy http://proxy:port
Python syntax error. Check if you're using the correct Python version for this package.
Import error — the package is installed but the specific name doesn't exist. This often means a version mismatch. Try upgrading: pip install --upgrade package-name
